programme.title: Basmati Blues

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con el inicio de las vacaciones, los shores se juntan para dar la bienvenida a los nuevos miembros de la familia. Alba se encuentra cara a cara con Diego y Karime, mientras que Chile toma la decisión de hacer justicia con el ladrón de sus frases.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Here we demonstrate how to make three Italian classics: Grilled Chicken ala Diavola, Frico, and Strawberries with Balsamic Vinegar.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Just when we think we've become familiar with every Italian dish under the sun, we're pleasantly surprised to come across one we've somehow overlooked—Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bridget shows Julia how to make perfect Cheese and Tomato Lasagna. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of jarred anchovies. Finally, Keith uncovers the secrets to Really Good Garlic Bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget go into the test kitchen together to uncover the secrets to Better Chicken Marsala. Next, Adam reviews Manual Citrus Juicers. Finally, Erin shows Bridget how to make the ultimate Skillet-Roasted Chicken in Lemon Sauce at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dan makes Bridget an Italian classic-Porchetta. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of ricotta. Lisa reviews wine coolers, and Erin uncovers the secrets to Parmesan Farrotto.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia uncover how to make the perfect Linguine allo Scoglio. Adam reveals his top pick for manual pasta machines. Then, Lisa reviews restaurant tools that every home cook should use. Finally, Becky makes Bridget Tuscan Shrimp and Beans.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia demonstrate the best weeknight Tagliatelle with Bolognese Sauce. Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of crushed tomatoes. Dan explains why you can’t overcook mushrooms. Finally, Becky makes Julia the ultimate Meatless “Meat” Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dan makes Bridget the quickest One-Hour Pizza. Adam reveals his top pick for baking stones and steels, and Lisa reviews under-appliance dusters. Then, Julia and Elle unlock the secrets to the ultimate Beef Short Rib Ragu.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Keith makes Bridget an Italian staple: Chicken Piccata. Then, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of unsalted butter, and Dan explains the science behind fat and temperature perception. Finally, Bridget and Julia demonstrate Chocolate Semifreddo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare an Indian-inspired shrimp curry and a Thai-inspired green curry with chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia cook up Tennessee Pulled Turkey Sandwiches. Then, Adam reviews paper towels. Next, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of extra-sharp cheddar cheese. And finally, Bryan shows Bridget a recipe for Eastern North Carolina Fish Stew.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget make the ultimate New Jersey Crumb Buns. Then, Adam reviews nonstick skillets. And finally, Lan Lam makes Julia a streamlined recipe for Cheese Blintzes with Raspberry Sauce.

programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The warriors make their way through the city, on the way to the enemy's gates.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Loyalties are tested for the warriors.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Anubis is given evil powers ahead of a new battle.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ronin Warriors come face to face with the Ancient One.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ronin Warriors leave behind their friends for a bridge to danger.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Ryo faces a life or death situation.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: One fierce battle ends in Cioccolata’s defeat, but another unfolds after Secco listens to Cioccolata’s revealing final voicemail. Bucciarati sinks into an intense underground struggle to stop Secco from reaching the secret stationed at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: One fierce battle ends in Cioccolata’s defeat, but another unfolds after Secco listens to Cioccolata’s revealing final voicemail. Bucciarati sinks into an intense underground struggle to stop Secco from reaching the secret stationed at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Key to defeating the Boss in hand, Polnareff waits for Bucciarati and crew. But the one who appears before him first is none other than the Boss of the Passione himself, Diavolo. The tides may not be the only things shifting in the battle yet to come.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Pierced by the arrow, Silver Chariot transforms into Chariot Requiem, its new power swapping the souls of all living creatures nearby. Realizing the dangers of the arrow in the wrong hands, Giorno and crew scramble to get ahold of it before Diavolo does.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Grotesque disfigurations begin to emerge from the soul-swapped bodies as Chariot Requiem’s frenzy rages on. Bucciarati and crew need to take back the arrow and fast. However, Giorno has a terrifying revelation, stopping everyone in their tracks.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: With the help of Uri, Gokudera hits Zakuro with one solid attack. But just then, Bluebell shows up to fight him too!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Lambo employs his Vongola Box’s power to defeat Kikyo’s Box Weapon. Lambo falls asleep and Kikyo takes this opportunity to open his Carnage Box!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The battle between the Varia and the duo Zakuro and Bluebell is only getting more intense. Tsuna begins to sense that something terrible has happened.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The last six Funeral Wreath finally arrives. Everyone is astonished by the sight of this unexpected last Funeral Wreath, and even Kikyo seems rattled.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The battle between Tsuna’s Deathperation Point Zero Breakthrough Revised and Ghost comes to an end, but something doesn’t seem right.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna is almost crushed by Byakuran’s power. The two of them keep firing back at each other. Tsuna’s and Byakuran’s rings begin to resonate loudly.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Byakuran is surprised at Vongola Primo’s unexpected visit. Yuni explains to Byakuran why Vongola Primo has come.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The battle in the future comes to an end. The group has suffered some major losses. Tsuna begins to have doubts that this battle was as important.

programme.title: Speed Racer [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: By air, Speed and his fellows are on the way to the Grand Prix, but their plane breaks down due to lightning, falling onto an uninhabited island with other passengers.

programme.title: Speed Racer [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: Speed receives a challenge letter from the Car Acrobatic Team, a team that he defeated in the Alpine Race one year ago. Speed heads for the designated spot although Racer X tries to stop him.

programme.title: Speed Racer [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: Mr. Goldminter, the richest man in the world, holds the Around the World Grand Prix. The champion will win tons of gold and his daughter, Lovelace. Upon a request, Speed joins the race with his pride as a racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: In order to win, the racers try to sabotage the race by any means necessary. Speed continues to race with his belief in fair play, but this motto comes to corner him. Speed aims to reach the goal driving the Mach 5, overcoming various obstacles.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Jackson adventures off-piste, while Brian Cox is surprised to find one of the world's greatest works of art in a most unusual place.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Television aristocracy Esther Rantzen challenges daughter and television presenter Rebecca Wilcox in and around Reading. Rebecca delights in diving into romance novels, and Esther hears the moving stories of British evacuees during WWII.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Lesley Joseph and Christopher Biggins hit the road around Essex and Buckinghamshire. Christopher stakes his competition on one high-risk purchase and Lesley is delighted to come face to face with an exquisite and unique artifact.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Rugby legends Phil Vickery and Martin Offiah take to the antiques trail around Bristol. Phil swaps a rugby ball for a polo stick and Martin finds out about man's first ascent into the skies.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Bergerac's John Nettles takes on actor Barbara Flynn near Devon and Dorset. Barbara learns about the local woman who was a scientific pioneer. Military enthusiast John hears the story of a training exercise for D-Day that ended in tragedy.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a battle between celebrity acting couple James Bolam and Susan Jameson. James finds out the secrets of a 170-year-old brewing tradition and bird lover Susan gets up close and personal with a unique and fascinating Dodo collection.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedians Rory McGrath and Steve Punt embark on an antiques quest around Warwickshire and Nottinghamshire. Rory experiences life in traditional Victorian Baths, and Steve learns the story behind a music revolution that began in Coventry.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Christopher Timothy and Patrick Robinson make their way around Gloucestershire and Herefordshire. Christopher proves to be a worthy student and Patrick shows us who's boss when he picks up an eclectic mix of goodies for the auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Presenters Gloria Hunniford and Angela Rippon road trip around Kent and Sussex. They stage a rescue mission for their stranded experts, Gloria hears the story behind a local landmark and Angela steps into the world of Virginia Wolfe.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Newsreaders Natasha Kaplinski and Michael Buerk embark on an adventure around Sussex. Michael tastes the delights of Hastings, and Natasha meets some woolly friends who played a vital role in during the industrial revolution.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Baroness Oona King and Dame Jenni Murray go head-to-head around London. Baroness Oona visits a band of female pioneers, and Dame Jenni learns the story behind a revolutionary organization that transformed animal welfare.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team pay a return visit to the gardens of Tatton Park in Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Among the objects exciting the experts is a collection of almost 500 ornamental pigs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts head to Chatsworth House in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team pay a second visit to Chatsworth House in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Rio Rancho, NM. Welterweight Champion Ben Askren takes on Welterweight season 8 tournament winner Andrey Koreskov. Then Michael Chandler defends his Lightweight belt against the Lightweight season 8 tournament winner David Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Michael Chandler once again goes up against Eddie Alvarez in a rematch for the Lightweight title. Also, Pat Curran defends his Featherweight belt against Daniel Straus and King Mo takes on Emanuel Newton for the Light Heavyweight title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Atlantic City, NJ. The Heavyweight belt is on the line as champion Alexander Volkov takes on Vitaly Minakov. Then in the main in the event Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson makes his Bellator MMA debut against Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Hammond, Indiana with the Featherweight World Title on the line as Champ Daniel Straus and former Champ Pat Curran meet for a third time to decide who walks away with the title.

programme.title: Bellator 123: Curran vs Pitbull 2
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Mohegan Sun as Pat Curran looks to defend his featherweight belt against bitter rival Patricio Pitbull. Also on the card, WWE superstar Bobby Lashley returns to the cage, along with knockout artists Cheick Kongo and King Mo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Plymouth, Missouri with the Light Heavyweight World Title on the line as Champ Emanuel Newton takes on journeyman Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator 125: Manhoef vs Marshall
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Fresno, California with a showdown between middleweight knockout artists Doug Marshall and Melvin Manhoef. Also in action is submission ace Goiti Yamauchi, Javy Ayala, and Rafael Carvalho.

programme.title: Bellator 131: Ortiz vs. Bonnar
programme.desc: The talking is over. Bonnar. Ortiz. Time to fight.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Thackerville, Oklahoma with the Bantamweight title on the line as Joe Warren defends his strap against Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu World Champion Marcos Galvao. And Ryan Couture faces off against Dakota Cochrane in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: Bellator 138: Kimbo vs Shamrock
programme.desc: Bellator MMA presents a grudge match seven years in the making as Kimbo Slice finally meets Ken Shamrock. Patricio Pitbull goes to war with Daniel Weichel for the featherweight title. Plus WWE superstar Bobby Lashley and Michael Chandler return to action.

programme.title: Bellator 144: Halsey vs Carvalho
programme.desc: The middleweight title is on the line as Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with Rafael Carvalho vs. Brandon Halsey. And walking highlight reel Michael “MVP” Page is in action, along with submission specialist Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown continues to tell her story of captivity by a serial killer. She claims her alleged abductor hoped she would one day fall in love with him. Inside her fight to survive and her dramatic rescue. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: New details of Rebecca Zahau's death: Was the scene staged to deceive police it was suicide? Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht reveals his findings to the family after examining Rebecca's exhumed remains. Does he think foul play was involved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 1. Dr. Phil tells the real story & meets the real people who knew the real monster that was Dahmer. Hear from the sister of a victim saying the Netflix series glorified the man she calls "Satan," also two men tortured by Dahmer.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a parent's worst nightmare to learn their child was sexually abused, especially in their own home. Patty says her world ended the day she learned her husband was sexually abusing her 3 daughters. What warning signs did she miss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you dread Valentine's Day and don't have a creative bone in your body, take heart, because Dr. Phil and Robin are here to help the romantically challenged!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany claims dad Charlie is scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie has given over $25K while "Stephanie" maintains a $4.5 million inheritance is coming. The investigation starts in Los Angeles and ends in Denmark!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's image has been splashed across magazine covers and TV screens in an effort to find the missing 3-year-old. With the bizarre twists and turns in this story, Dr. Phil's panel of experts probe into the case that has captivated millions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil welcomes controversial YouTuber "Agent Sebastian" who runs a page called "Cart Narcs" posting hundreds of explosive videos apprehending shoppers in parking lots who do not return their carts to the corrals. Is "Agent Sebastian" breaking the law?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mark & ex-wife, Melissa, say daughter, Malia, 17, has been running away since age 13, a 6th grade school drop out, & has become physically abusive. They say 2 years ago she became involved with a 35-year-old man & they fear she'll end up dead.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tiki Barber joins Drew & Ross Mathews on Drew's News covering headlines about lies in relationships & finding a sheep in an Airbnb. Chef Anne Burrell teaches cooking honey garlic salmon & charred string beans in Drew's Cooking School.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed prepares to underwrite con man Honest John's scheme to drill a channel in the mountains to draw off the smog in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbillies plan to go to Washington to give the President their $95,000,000 fortune to help fight air pollution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Romance enters Elly May's life in a big way when Navy Lt. Mark Templeton arrives at the Clampett mansion to pay a visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny consults a psychiatrist to give "modern medicine" a chance to keep frogman Mark Templeton from turning into a real frog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny battles to keep her family out of the swimming pool, convinced that if they get wet they'll turn into frogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny invites Shorty Kellems back from the hills to help break up Elly May's romance with Mark Templeton.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny thinks Shorty Kellems has turned into a seal because he ignored her warnings about swimming in the Clampett pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny is finally convinced that Elly May's boyfriend, Mark Templeton, is a human being -- not half-frog as she first suspected.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed, Granny, Elly May, and Jethro man the front lines against an expected invasion of grunion, which they believe to be hostile aliens.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbillies, encouraged by Mr. Drysdale, continue to guard the Malibu beach and repel the mythical Grunion invaders.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: Baby Boy
programme.desc: Jody is a 20-year-old African American in South Central L.A. who is trying to live large but doesn't have a job. Growing up is tough on Jody, but a series of events force him to learn lessons about living, loving and surviving as a man in the hood.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Jimi: All Is By My Side
programme.desc: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

programme.title: New Jack City
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes stars as Nino Brown, an American success story with a twist. He's young, handsome, smart, rich, and prominent in his community.

programme.title: The Harder They Come
programme.desc: Reggae legend Jimmy Cliff stars as Ivan Martin, an aspiring singer hoping to make a name for himself. Robbed of his money and possessions, he finds work with a self-righteous preacher

programme.title: The Wood
programme.desc: Lots of guys have second thoughts about marriage. Three hours before his wedding, Roland is having third, fourth and fifth thoughts. Good thing he’s got buddies Slim and Mike around to help.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When Lamont invites his ex-convict friend (guest star Ron Glass) to stay at the Sanford home, a most protective Grady steps in to defend the Sanford 'treasures.'

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred and Lamont's friends Bowlegs and Al pay a visit to show off their new nightclub act. But in the middle of the living room performance, Al sprains his back and can't make the all-important debut. Fred and Lamont substitute for the team.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Tom discovers that his biggest competition for a giant promotion is himself, but finds strength hiding in a short, unexpected person.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise takes on the neighborhood society snob in a battle of the grandchildren -- as Louise pits her tomboy granddaughter in a piano-playing competition against Mrs. Van Morris' 'music prodigy' grandson.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: When George and Louise catch two young hooligans red-handed trying to rip off the cleaners, Louise insists on a unique punishment.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George, Louise, and Florence take on Atlantic City with a vengeance: George's mission is to line his pockets, Florence's is to win enough to finance her trip to her godson's graduation, and Louise's is to meet celebrities.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: When George is ridiculed for bobbling a historic home run ball in the Yankee Stadium bleachers, Louise sneaks into the players' locker roam in search of the antidote for his depression -- Reggie Jackson.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: When Tom's long-winded storytelling drives away Helen, George, Louise, and Florence, Tom spends the evening in the company of five gorgeous women and learns what it is to be nature's gift to womankind.

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.
Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.
When Mary buys a piano, Rose peddles her teaching services to both her and Sandra--and the two pupils' rivalry inspires a competitive recital to determine who's learned more in three weeks.

When their church loses its lease, Mary coaxes an already overburdened Lester into supervising its move to a new location--but the parishioners are left without a place to worship on Christmas Day when the building mysteriously disappears
Mary and Sandra offer differing opinions when Rose is asked to spend the weekend in New York with the man of her dreams--who also happens to be one of Sandra's ex-nightmares.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie ignores Nicolette's premonition and agrees to fill in for an injured race car driver.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: In order to impress Nicolette and humiliate a potential suitor, Eddie steps in for Malcolm to coach a youth basketball team.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie enlists Malcolm to help babysit for his infant cousin.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: An argument leads to Malcolm and Eddie recalling their years together.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Flip plays Bill Russell in a game of 1-on-1 (chess, that is) and Geraldine square dances with Johnny Cash.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Slappy does stand-up; sketches include Pink Pirate (Conway) w/castaways (Flip & Slappy) and a convoluted con game.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Coco, Nabors & Flip do theater parody; Freddie Johnson shops for a card and Geraldine battles McNair to be queen of a parade.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Marty Feldman battles the Beast In The Basket and Howard Cosell judges Sandy & Flip's cakes in the county fair bake-off.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: George secures a $10,000 pledge for Katherine to run in a 10K charity race, but when she's injured, Webster decides to run for her.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: The family thinks Papa has a vision problem, but the truth is that Papa never learned to read.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: Webster meets a lonely woman on a dare from his friends and finds out that she is not the witch they said she was.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Bae is officially back at the Brooklyn shop. Ceaser decides to relocate the entire crew to Atlanta but Puma's nerves get the best of him when someone tests positive for COVID.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew moves into their new mansion in Atlanta. Tatti gets a promotion at the shop, while Donna starts a new hustle that puts them on a collision course. Meanwhile, a family crisis devastates Ceaser.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After a rocky start in Atlanta, things only get worse as Rok and Krystal's relationship gets tested by an artist in the Atlanta crew. Donna and Tatti's argument over a space in the new shop spills over into their personal lives.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Tensions between Donna and the team come to a head when the Black Ink Bosses decide to bring the teams together for some team bonding in the woods.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Tired of the constant fighting over who the best tattoo artist is, Ceaser decides to have the Black Ink artists put their art where their mouth is by conducting the first Black Ink tattoo competition to crown the lead artist.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Alex struggles with quarantining and his relationship with Donna, Tatti heads to Long Island to check on her family, and Krystal performs at Ted's showcase.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: As the crew gets ready to return to New York, Ceaser plans a final party in Atlanta and stuns Suzette when he gets down on one knee. Walt goes to extreme lengths to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The team is back from their Atlanta residency but quickly find out - what happens in Atlanta doesn't stay in Atlanta. Ceaser and the crew throw a block party to help stop the spread of Covid in the community by offering free tattoos for vaccines.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser holds a press conference in an attempt to clear his name, but when Ted doesn't show up to stand by him, he seeks support from an unlikely place. Spyder and Rok get to the bottom of what's been causing problems between them.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After the success of the Black Ink Battle in Atlanta, Puma decides, with Ceaser out of town, it's time for a Battle of the Sexes! Bae holds a walk for both Black Lives Matter and Stop Asian Hate with the support of the whole crew.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Bae finds out that her client from the tattoo competition had a negative experience with the Girls' Team. Ted and Krystal start preparing for an upcoming music video, and Ceaser fixes the failed Puma Production by bringing in an old friend.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Puma plan a huge billboard photo shoot with the help of Sassy, but then everything goes left. Ted gives Krystal an ultimatum, Rok has a family emergency and Ceaser gets some devastating news about his daughter.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the fallout of the court's decision, Ceaser steps into another crisis when Suzette learns she's facing serious health issues. Spyder celebrates his good health news by hosting a COVID-safe party. It's time to Mask-erade!

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Puma takes his family and in-laws on a luxury glamping trip on the land he co-owns at Chace Village. Ceaser invites Black Ink Chicago's very own Van to look after the shop while he confronts Suzette in Atlanta about their relationship.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim square off in a campus election.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: Kim puts her own spin on the legendary television show, 'Dallas,' by imagining her family and friends as the twisted characters from the primetime series of lust and greed.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: After a minor spat with Nikki gets blown way out of proportion, Kim spendsThanksgiving alone.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: Nikki tries out for cheerleading and Professor Oglevee tries too hard to be hip.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: If you think Nikki’s wild about Professor Oglevee, wait till you meet her grandmother!

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: Nikki uncovers a shocking secret about her family, while Kim and Stevie try to live without the use of African-American inventions.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: After finding out her rival will be writing her six-month performance review for the agency, Dee Dee makes an effort to tighten up her relationship with Brett outside the office. T

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: While Chase is out of town on a business trip, Lorenzo shares with Mona that he still has feelings for her. Although Mona remains committed to Chase, she begins to fantasize about Lorenzo.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: Mona is taking her break-up with Chase out on everyone- only to realize that she's also putting her professional career in jeopardy. Dee Dee's newly signed client is married but when she suspects he's having an affair she is faced with a moral dilemma.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: Mona discovers everyone is hanging out with Chase behind her back. Gus leaves town, leaving Brett in charge of the office. But when Dee Dee's colleagues tell her he is envious of her new responsibilities she tries to keep the peace in the office.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick goes crazy buying items in bulk that the family doesn't need at the The Big Box Club, discount super store.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Comical chaos ensues when the gang waits in line to shop at a department store on Black Friday. Here, Kevin anticipates buying a new video game, Lindsey meets a boy, relationship problems plague Martin and Terrence hopes to buy toys for charity.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: A guys' night out goes awry, resulting in lost recollections due to alcohol-fueled blackouts and the disappearance of Nick's wedding ring.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick attends his high-school reunion but must face an embarrassing incident from his past. Meanwhile, Lindsey throws a party.

programme.title: Roc

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: To help her win a promotion at the hospital, Eleanor asks Andrew to romance the head nurse, Matty.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: While Joey tricks two famous jazz musicians into playing with him, Eleanor worries that Roc is getting too friendly with neighborhood vigilante Ronnie Paxton.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When tests confirm a low sperm count, Roc Emerson asks his brother, Joey, to donate sperm so Eleanor can have a baby. Later, Roc changes his mind.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: Cash-strapped college students Nikki and Kim Parker become a mother-daughter telephone psychic team.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: When Nikki, Kim and Stevie pledge with a sorority they are ordered to 'expose' Professor Oglevee.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: With Nikki’s help, the school geek becomes the campus hottie.

programme.desc: Woman Thou Art Loosed follows the life of Michelle Jordan (Kimberly Elise) who is raised in a home of dysfunction and abuse. The years of mistreatment from her mother's (Loretta Devine) boyfriend results in Michelle's entanglement in the world of drugs

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: An illegal drug shipment arriving in New York City forces Danny to partner up with his Texas Ranger associate to find the narcotics. Also, Jamie makes a concerning discovery about a former mentor, and Frank receives pushback from Mayor Chase.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny pursues Dickie Delaney (Jimmy Buffett), a con artist pretending to be the legendary singer Jimmy Buffett, after he's tricked into paying for the scammer's meal at an expensive restaurant.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is at odds with his friend Archbishop Kearns (Stacy Keach) when he says the NYPD arrested the wrong man for a murder, but he can't break the confessional seal to reveal the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez's investigation into a brutal assault on a NYPD detective reveals a dirty cop within Frank's ranks. Also, Eddie and Badillo track down bookstore culprits; Jamie joins Henry as he looks into a friend's death; and Erin snoops on a new woman.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Anthony team up with Erin's nephew, police officer Joe Hill, to course-correct a trial when Joe becomes aware of witness tampering.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank contends with public outcry to defund the NYPD School Safety Division, after a physical altercation between a school officer and a student goes viral.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank, Baker, Garrett and Gormley experience feelings of guilt when Detective Angela Reddick (Ilfenish Hadera), an officer they briefly worked with at 1PP, is shot after Frank reassigned her for not meshing with their team.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is blindsided when Mayor Chase bypasses him with a request for Jamie to head his security detail. Also, Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a wealthy college student, and Eddie experiences tension with her partner, Badillo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Horatio captura al último fugitivo de la cárcel, su avión de transporte realiza un aterrizaje forzoso y se descubre que el fugitivo tiene planeado algo más que una fuga.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vidas de Horatio y Natalia penden de un hilo mientras Horatio se interpone entre Natalia y una muerte segura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tieso (S10 Ep2)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un tornado pasa por encima de una escena de un crimen, daña la evidencia y pone a Ryan y Walter en grave peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo persigue a un asesino sádico que les quita los ojos a las mujeres y un nuevo archienemigo desafía a Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protege a una jefa de la policía mexicana del misterioso asesino que mató a su esposo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En una mansión desierta, el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo colgando que parece haber sido asesinado por un vampiro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino enmascarado interrumpe un juego de póquer de altas apuestas y deja a un jugador muerto y desconcertado al equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio encuentra otro cadáver al que le faltan los ojos, todo apunta a su archienemigo, el Atormentador, pero él tiene una coartada irrefutable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando tres asesinos condenados salen de la cárcel y alguien comienza a matarlos uno por uno.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a conspiracy-obsessed woman is found dead, the CSIs investigate and discover that some of her theories may have had some truth to them.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a woman's death as the work of a serial killer. Mac reconnects with his first partner after an ex-con begins stalking him.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac and his ex-partner become part of a vendetta 17 years in the making.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an awkward teen is found dead, the team discovers that his efforts to win a sexy punk rock chick’s heart may have gone a step too far.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the body of a beautiful young woman is found in a stolen Ferrari, the investigation leads to a family of car thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A night out for a friendly drink takes a very unexpected turn when Danny and his rookie cops are caught up in a shooting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates when the recently paroled brother of a young basketball prodigy is implicated in a murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fraternity prank goes awry on Halloween and a pledge master is left for dead in an open grave.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when news of a high school house party goes viral, resulting in overcrowding, a collapsed porch, and a teenage girl’s death.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerte reconocida (S6 Ep 4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre ADN que contradice un caso de asesinato que antes era aparentemente sencillo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cicatrices de batalla (S6 Ep 5)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI de Nueva York para investigar el reciente asesinato de un bailarín de hip hop clandestino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Me sucedió a mí (S6 Ep 6)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ejecutivo de software, el equipo de CSI se expone al mundo oculto del sexo con alimentos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: A toda marcha (S6 Ep 7)
programme.desc: Un miembro del equipo de CSI de las Vegas, Ray Langston, llega a Nueva York para ayudar a Mac y a su equipo a intentar salvar a un rehén de una red de trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El nido del Cucú (S6 Ep 8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York reanuda su búsqueda del Asesino de la Brújula después de que un cuerpo cae del puente de la calle 59.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Solsticio de Manhattan (S6 Ep 9)
programme.desc: En la culminación de un misterio de varios episodios, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre la oscura guarida del Asesino de la Brújula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La casa de la muerte (S6 Ep 10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York realiza un seguimiento de una llamada a Emergencias que lo lleva a un ático vacío, pero encuentra un cadáver de casi 100 años y una casa con trampas explosivas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Segundas oportunidades (S6 Ep 11)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un drogadicto rehabilitado muerto en un callejón y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que él fue víctima de un complot premeditado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justicia criminal (S6 Ep 12)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un brutal apuñalamiento, descubre que se colocaron pruebas en la escena del crimen y eso los enfrenta a un colega de confianza.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Castigo en el juego (S6 Ep 13)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una hermosa mariscal de campo, estrella de la liga femenina, asesinada en un jacuzzi, llaman al equipo de CSI para que descubra quién la quería muerta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Amor sanguíneo (S6 Ep 14)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una mujer joven muerta en el Central Park, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York es atraído hacia la misteriosa subcultura del vampirismo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fórmula (S6 Ep 15)
programme.desc: Cuando una leyenda de las carreras de autos muere en una feroz explosión, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que la causa es una alteración en el auto.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El reinando de la incertidumbre (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a cuatro víctimas muertas en una habitación de hotel y el principal sospechoso aparece empuñando un hacha, el equipo de CSI intenta reconstruir los detalles.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La olla de oro (S6 Ep 17)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Giselle conoció a Víctor y este la introdujo en el mundo de la droga y el Twerking, ahora él la quiere dejar. Milady tiene una condición que hace que todo su cuerpo huela a pescado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Patricia puso en práctica uno de los consejos de Diabla y Estrella, con resultados catastróficos. Tras perder a su hijo, Arturo y Fiorella probaron una técnica para salir de la depresión.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Daniela se hizo varias fotos en los monumentos al Holocausto, pero alteraron sus imágenes. También, Anthony recibió fotografías de su hija muerta y, por los nervios, tuvo un accidente.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Abby y Jaime necesita otro corazón, pero no aparece un donante, Jaime piensa ir al mercado negro. La madrastra se opone a que Lucas explote el talento de su hermano en videojuegos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: José cayó en depresión y su esposo Juan le ayuda con un medicamento llamado Ketamina que lo droga. Además, el hermano de Marla es menor de edad y junto a otro amigo mataron al papá de José.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Bernardo es un estilista que ayudó a su amiga Tania a salir de Cuba, luego ella le tendió una mano a él y se siente traicionada. Pedro olvidó que su hija estaba en el auto y la niña murió.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jazmín está descuidando su casa y su aspecto físico por ahorrar dinero para la universidad de su hija Katerine. Magali es actriz y en un casting Romeo le pide que se desnude y se masturbe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luciana es la esposa de Ricky G., un cantante merenguero, pero desde que se separó no tiene producciones. Además, Macaria trabaja en un departamento forense y publica fotos escalofriantes.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Sergio tiene serias sospechas de que su esposa lo engaña. Ella es conductora de Uber y siempre carga condones. Además, Alberto se cortó el pene por accidente y en el hospital se lo pegaron mal.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El novio de Lucía está enfermo, pero la esposa legal le quita el derecho a cuidarlo. Además, el esposo de Ivonne padece una condición que lo hace orinarse y defecar cuando tiene un orgasmo.

programme.title: La Mujer de Oro
programme.desc: Una cajera de banco desarrolla un elaborado plan para sacar el dinero de la bóveda donde trabaja.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: De carne y hueso
programme.desc: Una figura del pasado despierta un recuerdo profundo y oscuro, como una historia familiar escrita a sangre fría.

programme.title: El ilusionista

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Tras una noche de pasión desenfrenada, Rebecca Carlson (Madonna) será juzgada por asesinato. Ahora está en manos de su abogado (Willem Dafoe) demostrar su inocencia, aunque el camino hacia la verdad tiene tantas curvas como su seductora cliente.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Las Aparicio: La película
programme.desc: La exitosa serie “Las Aparicio” se traduce al cine y narra la historia de una familia de mujeres, pero; víctimas de una maldición, son viudas y no pueden concebir niños varones, por lo que deben unirse para resolver el secreto detrás de su viejo hogar.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Sentencia de muerte
programme.desc: La superestrella de acción Jean-Claude van Damme (Contacto sangriento, Cyborg) es un veterano agente secreto que se hace pasar por un recluso en una peligrosa prisión estatal.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Kickboxer

programme.title: Iron Monkey

programme.title: La Hora De Los Heroes
programme.desc: El teniente coronel Caldwell y el inspector del policía Jay Austin no se caen bien. Ni siquiera un poco. Se debe a que Caldwell ayudó a sacar a Austin de la policía militar unos años antes.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Piedras
programme.desc: La película narra la trayectoría paralela y conflictiva de cinco mujeres: Anita, Isabel, Adela, Leire, y Maricarmen. Ellas se esfuerzan para remover las piedras que insistentemente aparecen en su camino, o peor, que están en sus zapatos.

programme.title: Huachicolero
programme.desc: Un enamoramiento inocente lleva a Lalo, de 14 años de edad, a descender al mundo criminal de la extracción ilegal de gasolina. Lo que comienza como un atajo hacia el último smartphone se convierte, rápidamente, en una pelea mortal por su vida.

programme.title: Bosque de sombras
programme.desc: Una pareja inglesa de vacaciones en España se horroriza al descubrir a una joven que ha sido encerrada por los locales.

programme.title: Familia de medianoche

programme.title: Música en espera
programme.desc: Un compositor y una mujer embarazada se ayudan el uno al otro para solucionar sus problemas.

programme.title: Canela

programme.title: Sumergidos

programme.title: Especies

programme.title: Escondete

programme.title: El día de los inocentes
programme.desc: Cuando Muffy St. John invitó a sus amigos de la universidad a la isla privada de sus padres para divertirse, olvidó decirles que podría ser el último viaje de sus vidas.

programme.title: Portadores
programme.desc: Chris Pine protagoniza este intenso y cautivante thriller, Portadores. Es la terrorífica historia de cuatro adolescentes que descubren que son más peligrosos para sí mismos que el virus global mortal del que intentan escapar.

programme.title: Alumno encubierto
programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.title: La chica de rojo
programme.desc: Cuando Teddy se cruza con una mujer que usa un provocativo vestido de seda rojo, descubre que ella es la modelo elegida por su agencia para una nueva campaña. Desde entonces, el sueño de Teddy será tener un romance con ella.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Siete psicópatas y un perro
programme.desc: Un guionista en apuros, sin darse cuenta, se enreda en el inframundo criminal de Los Ángeles después de que sus locos amigos desequilibrados secuestran al amado perro Shih Tzu de un gángster.

programme.title: Alumno encubierto

programme.desc: Newkirk hides a stolen German codebook in a dry well, Hogan must come up with a way to get it back.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A gas station has just been set up at Stalag 13 and Hogan plans to blow it up.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: Hogan's assignment is to discover the secrets of a new bomb (the "Chicken Hawk") that seeks out radio signals, and think of a way to stop its manufacture.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: After slugging Maude when he was loaded the night before, Walter comes downstairs the next morning full of guilt and remorse and wallowing in self-pity. Although Walter has promised to stop drinking, a phone call from his office sets him off again.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter declares his own 'I Love You Day' holiday, but his plans to spend a romantic day with Maude are thwarted by Vivian, Maude's best friend, who insists on unloading her divorce-proceedings problems.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Is it fair for a woman to admit being attracted to a man other than her husband? The man repairing the Findlay's furnace is more interested in lighting Florida's fire than in heating the house and refuses to take no for an answer.

programme.desc: Just before leaving on a flight to Europe, Mike's hippie friends need a place to stay for the night. Mike invites them to stay in the Bunker's living room, however, Archie objects citing that no unmarried couple will spend the night under his roof.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie discovers that a new family is moving to the neighborhood. He goes over to investigate, only to discover that the new family is black. Archie quickly hopes to round the neighborhood up and try to force the family out of the area.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is all excited that she has been chosen for jury duty. When Archie realizes that she may be sequestered, he forbids her to be on the jury, wanting to keep her at home to cook and clean for him. When she is sequestered, Archie fends for himself.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. No one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it turns into a three ring circus.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria has been reading books on women's lib and encourages Edith to try a little liberation. However, Mike won't take any of her ideas, which leads to huge fight in which Gloria demands that Mike recognize her as an equal partner in their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre Tammy Tatum fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
